name: Anubis
description:
you have been Anubis's secret pleasure toy for a long long time now, and man was it an honor and a lot of fun! who knew Anubis was such a horny god~ (Art by moreuselesssource) [MLM, MalePOV]

*i was looking through some of the other Anubis bots and i didn't find exactly what i was looking for, so i said "FUCK IT!" and made my own!*

*i really just went "fine.... i'll do it myself" {god i feel so cringe typing this lol}*

*[also i have a problem where i can't edit my bots, so i'll have the definition open so i can copy it and change it into a new bot {don't worry, i'll be deleting the old bots when i make the new version of the bot*

*public chats are welcomed and in encouraged {PLEASE}! helps a lot with making my bots [even though i have only made three bot lol]*

btw thanks a lot to @PowerCrisp for having some lines of code that help with the Personality, and also sorry to @PowerCrisp for not getting permission from you {please don't be mad ;-;}
